titleStmt.title: SII 25.167: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 167. (A.R. No. 167 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti, Pūmādu-puṇarapuvimādu-vaḷara, etc., of the king. The details of the date of the record viz., year 12, Ṛishabha śu 6, Thursday, Magha-nakshatra regularly correspond to 1130 A.D., May 15, f.d.n. 26.

It records the assignment of 6 mā of land including the dēvadāṉa lands to meet the expenses of the different worship and food-offerings to the deity Kūttāḍumdēvar by the śrīmāhēśvara-kaṇkāṇi-cheyvārgaḷ, dēvakaṉmis, śrīkāryam-cheyvārgaḷ śrībhaṇḍāra-kaṇkāṇi-cheyvārgaḷ and the paṉmāhēśvaras of the temple of Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Pañchavanmādēvichchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, for 7 kāśu and the arrears of interest (paliśai) amount of 10 kāśu on this obtained from Kōdaiy Irāmaṉ of Veṇpula-nāḍu. In exchange (parivarttaṉai) for the bits of iṟaiyili lands of the village from Koḍumalaiyāḷaṉ Kōdaiy Irāmaṉ, the six mā of lands lying to the east of Pavitramāṇikkaval and to the north of Rājēndraṉ-vāykkāl was given.

The order (niyōgam) relating to this parivarttaṉai was drafted by the temple accountant uḍaiyaṉ Maṇḍaiyaṉ, who is a karaṇattāṉ and native of Pērāvūr and Mādaṉamaṅgalam. It was attested by śivavēdiyār-kaṇkāṇi Parasamaiya Gowrinambi, dēvakanmi Nārpatteṇṇāyira-bhaṭṭan and the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .— pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat tantirupatu malar manṉavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ce
ṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi
naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṅ hāsaṉattu tribhuvanamuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesari panmarāna tribhuvanaccakrava
rttikaḷ śrī vikramacoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 10 2āvatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum viyāḻak kiḻamaiyum peṟ
ṟa makattunāḷ kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭup pañcavanmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭai
yār cittiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum tevakanmikaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum śibhaṇḍāra kaṇkāṇi ceyvār
kaḷum Uḷḷiṭaippaṭṭa panmāheśvararum kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Ivvūrirukkum koṭumalaiyāḷaṉ veṇpula nāṭṭuk ko
taiyirāmaṉ pakkal Idevar Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyili nilamāy palacatirattum cilvāṉamāy varukiṟa nilam Idevar tevatāṉat toṭuṅ kūṭalc ceṟṟiyumāy nalla
nilatte parivarttaṉai paṇṇukaikku Ivan pakkalkoṇṭa kācu 7 Ikkācu Eḻukkum Ivaṉuṭaṉ peciṉa palicai yeṟṟi Innāḷvaraiyil
kaṭava kācu 10 Ikkācu pattum Iṉṉāḷvaraiyil kuṭukkamāṭṭāmaiyil Ikkācukkuk kuṭuttup parivarttaṉai paṇṇina nilam pavitramāṇikkava
tikku kiḻakku rājentraṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku 5 ṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu śrī karaṇamacakkaleṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa rūpāy lattil teṟ
kaṭaiyattiṭal nikki rūpāy kha� Iṉnilam Āṟumāvum viṭṭu Ivvāṇṭu Iṉnilattu māttāl patināṟkalamāka vaṉta nellum Araikkāl vā
ciyum Eṟṟi ḷa9 1000 4 100 ñ(1/2)ḷā02 100 4 10 6 ñkkil An=tarāyakkācukku Uddeśappaṭi Irupatinkalanellu nikki ḷa7 1000 4 100ñkku mekoṇṭu kūttā
ṭudevarkku tiruccāntu cārtti Eḻuntaruḷukaikku tirukkāppukaraṇamutalāka van=ta Upakaraṇaṅkaḷ veṇṭuvanavaiyiṟṟukkum Iṉ nāḷoṉṟukkum co
ṟiṭukaikkum Ikkācu pattukkum Innilam Āṟumāvum viṭṭom veṇpulanāṭṭuk kotaiyirāmaṉukku Ivvaṉaivom . Ippaṭikku Aḻivuceyvā
rum Ippaṭiyil tāḻavuḷḷutu keṭṭu Ittirunāḷ ceyviyātārum tiruvāṇai tiruviraiyākkaliye . Ippaṭi Ivarkaḷ paṇiyāl Inniyokam Eḻutiṉen Ik
koyil kaṇakku mātāṉamaṅkala muṭaiyān karaṇattāṉ perāvūruṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ maṇṭaiyeṉ Ivaiyeṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭikku śivavetiyār ka
ṇkāṇi paracamaiyakoḷari nammi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku tevakanmi nāṟppatteṇāyira bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkoyil
—ṇan Ātrayaṉ coṉṉavāṟṟivarnāyaka neḻuttu
sitaātrayaṉ Ampalattiluṟainta nampi sayi
jñaiyātanamaikku Ivai mokili
yan caṅkaranārāyaṇan karumāṇikkattiṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilil śivabrā
hmaṇan kāśyapan piramaṉ coṉṉavāḷṟivāne
ḻuttu § Itu vācciyan kūtta nārāyaṇan sa
yijñaiyātaṉamaikku kaviṇiya nārāya
ṇan śrīkuṣṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai mokiliyaṉ Anantacaya
ṉan perāyiramuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai comattiyan tiru
varaṅkamuṭaiyān colai Aracu bhaṭṭane
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan kecavan Aṭikaḷ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapan kecavanārāyaṇa bhaṭṭane
ḻuttu 10 Ippaṭikku sarvvakratu parañcoti sayijñai
yātanamaikku kaviṇiyanārāyaṇan śrīkruṣṇane
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyan caṅkara
nārāyaṇan karumāṇikkattin Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven colaimalai Āyar
koḻuntu bhaṭṭaṉen Ivai yen
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāya
caṅkaranārāyaṇa ṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kaviṇiyan tirumāṇikkan tiruvara
ṅkappaṭṭa neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven ka
viṇiyan parameśvaran kūttap pirāneḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliya nārāyaṇa
n caṅkaranārāyaṇa bhaṭṭa neḻuttu Itu paṉ
māheśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 25.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
